message:
feat(mux): add tunnel sharing, share dialog, and frame skip alignment

- Add tunnel provider integration (cloudflare, ngrok, tailscale) with
  interactive picker on startup and CLI flags (--cloudflare, --ngrok,
  --tailscale, --local)
- Display QR code and LAN URL in terminal for easy mobile access
- Replace admin/auth menu with Share dialog showing URL + QR code
- Add main client election so only one browser tab controls the terminal
- Align frame skip between macOS (IOSurface seed) and Linux (XxHash64)
- Fix macOS frame skip bug where captureFromIOSurface return was ignored
- Set keyframe interval to 600 frames (20s) on both platforms
